hypothesis: Adapting the model with a MOF-aware tokenizer that introduces special tokens for MOFid segments, SMILES substrings, and RCSR topology codes prior to the same PMC+PubChem continual pretraining will reduce QMOF band-gap MAE by at least 10% relative to the paper’s best PMC+PubChem model when fine-tuned on 1K–3K SFT samples, while altering hMOF MAE by less than 2%.
